summary: Converted logex-io from single-tenant viewer to multi-tenant SaaS. Added /api/articles/index + /api/articles/[...path] server proxies that read the user's OAuth access_token from the HS256 session JWT and fetch <login>/logex-data via GitHub API. Rewrote GitHubAdapter to call same-origin /api/articles/* only, with RepoNotFoundError / UnauthenticatedError / InsufficientScopeError surfaced for UI gating. Deleted ALLOWED_GITHUB_USERS allowlist, expanded OAuth scope to read:user+repo, added EmptyOnboarding component with 3-step onboarding, snapshotted article body into ShareRecord at creation so share/[id] no longer needs any GitHub token.
